subcodes.title: Address to the friends at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-03-07
subcodes.first_line: You are welcome! I constantly pray for you and beg for each the divine Confirmations, so that the eye of your insight may be opened to see those objects
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
